name: Chamber
long_description: Chamber puts your AI infrastructure on autopilot, and saves your machine learning engineers hours of manual effort. Our agents continually monitor, detects failures, provide root-cause analysis, resolve issues, and optimize AI workloads and scale across clouds. It operates like an autonomous infrastructure team, helping save your research and engineers hours each day, and debugging workload performance issues. Your ML teams move faster, infra waste drops, and GPU bottlenecks disappear.
one_liner: The AIOps Agent for ML Teams
